creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
Silver Tree is a single player 3D, party-based RPG. The game takes
place in a steampunk/fantasy world, with a hex tile based game
system that is a hybrid of real time and turn-based play.

The game engine aims for flexibility to allow extensive user-created
content.

From the creators of Battle for Wesnoth.

WWW: http://www.silvertreerpg.org/
